name: run_squidpy_nhood_enrichment
description: Run Squidpy (Palla et al., Nature Methods 2022) neighborhood enrichment on spatial single-cell data. Builds a spatial neighbors graph from cell coordinates in adata.obsm['spatial'], then permutation-tests which pairs of cluster categories (e.g. cell types) are co-localized (enriched, positive z-score) or segregated (depleted, negative z-score). Returns the category x category z-score matrix plus the category labels. Input is a server-accessible spatial .h5ad with adata.obsm['spatial'] coordinates and `cluster_key` in adata.obs.

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path or URL to a spatial .h5ad AnnData with adata.obsm['spatial'] coordinates and `cluster_key` in adata.obs.

cluster_key.description: obs column with the categorical cluster/cell-type labels to test for co-localization (e.g. 'cell_type').

n_neighs.description: Number of nearest spatial neighbors per cell when building the graph (default 6).

categories.description: Category labels; row/column order of the z-score matrix.

zscore_matrix.description: Symmetric n_categories x n_categories neighborhood-enrichment z-scores (positive = co-localized, negative = segregated).

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
